seoTitle: Freemantle vs Frenchs Forest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Freemantle and Frenchs Forest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Freemantle vs Frenchs Forest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Freemantle and Frenchs Forest.
heading: Freemantle vs Frenchs Forest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Freemantle, New South Wales and Frenchs Forest, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Freemantle has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Frenchs Forest (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Freemantle or Frenchs Forest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Freemantle has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Frenchs Forest scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Freemantle scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Frenchs Forest scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Freemantle or Frenchs Forest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Freemantle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
